ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "criminal_cases" INTEGER /* Number of criminal cases against the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the candidate */,
  "liabilities" INTEGER /* Liabilities of the candidate */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate won the election (1) or not (0) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency where the candidate is contesting */,
  "candidate_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate type */,
  "is_independent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate is independent (1) or not (0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_candidate_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_type_id") REFERENCES candidate_types ("candidate_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the party (e.g., BJP, AITC) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* Path to the party's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the constituency is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the constituency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, by-election) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency where the election was held */,
  "polling_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters for the election */,
  "total_polling_stations" INTEGER /* Total number of polling stations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "voting_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Total valid votes in the election */,
  "vote_share_percentage" REAL /* Vote share percentage of the candidate */,
  "rejected_votes" INTEGER /* Number of rejected votes */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_types" (
  "candidate_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate type */,
  "candidate_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the candidate type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_constituency_bridge" (
  "bridge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bridge entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the constituency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bridge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_constituency_bridge_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_constituency_bridge_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total votes in the election */,
  "valid_votes" INTEGER /* Valid votes in the election */,
  "rejected_votes" INTEGER /* Number of rejected votes */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., candidate-wise, constituency-wise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_education_details" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "degree" TEXT /* The degree or highest educational qualification */,
  "institute" TEXT /* The name of the institute or university */,
  "year_of_passing" INTEGER /* The year the candidate passed the degree */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* The specialization within the degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_education_details_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_financial_details" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the candidate */,
  "liabilities" INTEGER /* Liabilities of the candidate */,
  "source_of_wealth" TEXT /* Source of the candidate's wealth */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_financial_details_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
